name: operator override: the operator rule includes a `supersedes` field naming the original source_file and origin
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json > out.txt 2>/dev/null && grep -E '"supersedes":\{[^}]*"operator_source":"_operator/o.yaml"' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: r1, name: r1, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/google/g.yaml

printf 'source:
  id: o
  authoritative_publisher: O
  authoritative_url: https://o.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: r1, name: r1, description: stricter, detector: x}
' > tree/_operator/o.yaml
